V6 REVIEW ROOT FIX — preserve angle 0 and the revised mirror-path kernel. Address N-strawman and C-wellposed with the exact mathematics, not by reverting the sharp rate or weakening the internal limitation.

C-wellposed, sign consistency: make the centering calculation explicit in prop:score-contrast-template and its proof route. Under the plus law the true leaf Jacobian is the constant -b^{-1}, while the true non-leaf Jacobian is -b^{-1}+delta W_delta. For a centered sample-variance functional, adding nuisance error e changes the non-leaf variance by at most 2 sqrt(V(delta W_delta) V(e))+V(e)=O_P(|delta| r_n+r_n^2), not O_P(r_n); the constant baseline is annihilated by centering. The leaf error is O_P(r_n^2). Since sqrt(C_m(delta_n)) is asymptotic to sqrt(c_1)|delta_n|, r_n=o(sqrt(C_m)) is exactly r_n=o(|delta_n|), making both errors o_P(delta_n^2). Retain this sharp rate and state the deterministic centered-variance inequality.

C-wellposed, rare-event admissibility: explicitly state the premise is a TRAINING-RANDOM L4 norm bounded in probability, not an expected L4 norm. On exceptional training event A_n replace the estimator by any finite-L4 bad branch; outside A_n retain the baseline. For every M, P{||Jtilde-J||_4 > M r_n} <= P(A_n)+P{||Jbar-J||_4>M r_n}. Since P(A_n)->0, this preserves O_P(r_n) regardless of exceptional-branch amplitude. Therefore no M_n q_n^(1/4)=O(r_n) relation is required; that relation would belong to an expectation/unconditional-moment premise that is not assumed. Include this tail-characterization inequality verbatim in the proof route and make the training-measurability explicit.

N-strawman: recast the negative half exclusively as an INTERNAL limitation of the newly defined cross-fitted score-contrast template and its weak L4-in-probability premise. Do not say Zhu, Koehler, Rolland, or any published SCORE workflow made this premise or claimed this exponent. State that those papers motivate the comparison but are not refuted. The contribution is the sharp likelihood benchmark plus a diagnostic separating consistency from what additional exponential stability would be needed; it is not a literature-facing impossibility claim.

Update tldr, project_justification.{gap,niche,fill}, related_work, honest_scope, proposition justification/gap/consumer, OEQ handle, comparator table, soundness self-review, and accepted scope caveats consistently. Preserve field tier, all v6 cleanup, thm:local-minimax-elbow, exact equalizer, and the no-uniform-global-constant caveat.

K_{+,n}=E_{m_n^n}[exp(L_n/2) 1{widehat Delta_n<0}],
K_{-,n}=E_{m_n^n}[exp(-L_n/2) 1{widehat Delta_n>=0}].
Target the exact identity max_h P_h^n{D_n!=h}=exp{-n C_star(delta_n)} max(K_{+,n},K_{-,n}) and the iff condition log max(K_+,K_-)=o(n C_star) for the sharp exponent.
